thought.example: She shared her thoughts about the book.
thought.example_zh: 她分享了對這本書的想法。

thought.example: He gave the plan a lot of thought.
thought.example_zh: 他對這個計畫想了很多。

thunder.example: We heard thunder during the storm.
thunder.example_zh: 暴風雨中我們聽見雷聲。

thus.example: He studied hard; thus, he passed.
thus.example_zh: 他用功讀書，因此通過了。

till.example: Wait here till I come back.

tiny.example: A tiny ant climbed up the wall.

tire.example: The car has a flat tire.
tire.example_zh: 這輛車有個輪胎沒氣了。

tire.example: The long walk tired the children.
tire.example_zh: 長途步行讓孩子們累壞了。

tissue.example: She wiped her nose with a tissue.
Muscle is a kind of body tissue.

title.example: What is the title of the book?
She won the title of champion.

toast.example: I had toast and eggs for breakfast.

tone.example: She spoke in a gentle tone.
The room is painted in warm tones.

tongue.example: The hot soup burned my tongue.
English is not her mother tongue.

toothache.example: I went to the dentist with a toothache.

tour.example: We took a tour of the old city.
The band toured around the country.

track.example: The runners ran around the track.
The app can track your steps.
track.example_zh: 這個應用程式能追蹤你的步數。

trade.example: Trade between the two countries is growing.
trade.example_zh: 兩國間的貿易正在成長。

tradition.example: Eating dumplings is a family tradition.

trap.example: The mouse was caught in a trap.
They were trapped in the elevator.

trash.example: Throw the trash in the bin.

travel.example: They love to travel during summer.
Air travel is fast and convenient.
travel.example_zh: 搭飛機旅行又快又方便。

treasure.example: The pirates searched for buried treasure.
She treasures the gift from her mom.

trial.example: The man waited for his trial in court.
trial.example_zh: 那名男子在法庭等待審判。

trial.example: The new drug is still on trial.

trick.example: The magician showed us a clever trick.
trick.example_zh: 魔術師表演了一個巧妙的把戲。

trick.example: He tricked me into believing it.

true.example: Is the story true or made up?
true.example_zh: 這個故事是真的還是編的？

trust.example: I trust my best friend completely.
trust.example_zh: 我完全信任我最好的朋友。

trust.example: It takes time to build trust.

tube.example: She squeezed paste from the tube.
tube.example_zh: 她從軟管裡擠出膏狀物。

turtle.example: The turtle slowly crossed the road.

typical.example: This is a typical day at school.
typical.example_zh: 這是學校裡平常的一天。

ugly.example: The duckling thought it was ugly.
ugly.example_zh: 那隻小鴨以為自己很醜。

umbrella.example: Take an umbrella; it might rain.

unit.example: We finished the first unit of the book.
unit.example_zh: 我們上完了這本書的第一單元。

unit.example: A meter is a unit of length.

universe.example: There are countless stars in the universe.

university.example: He hopes to enter a good university.
university.example_zh: 他希望進入一所好大學。

unless.example: We won't go unless it stops raining.
unless.example_zh: 除非雨停，否則我們不去。

upload.example: She uploaded the photos to the website.

upon.example: The cat sat upon the warm roof.

upper.example: Her office is on the upper floor.

upset.example: She was upset about losing the game.

upset.example_zh: 這壞消息讓大家都很難過。

used.example: He bought a used car at a low price.
used.example_zh: 他低價買了一輛二手車。

used.example: She is used to getting up early.

user.example: The app has millions of users.
user.example_zh: 這個應用程式有數百萬名用戶。
